---
title: "Captain William Charles Harris"
---

## Captain William Charles Harris

**Dates:** (1809-1887)

### Description

chief constable of Hampshire from 1843

### Biography

Mentioned (24 Sept 1846).

### Letters

- Letter from Otterbourn  Friday [December 1854?]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
